CustomField.description: Heap Size usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsHeapSizeMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c / LimitsHeapSizeMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.HeapSize.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c / LimitsHeapSizeMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.HeapSize.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c / LimitsHeapSizeMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsHeapSizeMax__c) & " bytes)" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Heap Size usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Heap Size
